title: AI Trust & Safety Digest
tagline: A curated current snapshot of AI trust, safety, and governance, including as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
lead: Today’s signal is concentrated in operational safeguards rather than new standards or evaluations. The strongest updates focus on election integrity and privacy-preserving data analysis, both relevant to how AI systems are deployed responsibly in high-risk contexts and how sensitive data can be used without expanding trust assumptions.

items.title: Google outlines private analytics with zero-trust aggregation
items.why_it_matters: It advances privacy-preserving measurement by reducing the need to trust any single data-processing party.

items.title: OpenAI details election information and safeguards for 2026
items.why_it_matters: It updates deployment safeguards for a high-risk domain: civic information, transparency, and cyber defense support.

note: Selected from recent trust-and-safety relevant posts and papers by labs, evaluators, standards bodies, policy organizations, and arXiv, then summarized with GPT-5.4. Includes as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
